response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. No vocal audio or music detected in this segment; the video consists of a single static promotional image for Todoroki Hajime's birthday live. 2. The Reference JSON confirms the absence of vocal music throughout the 1:12 duration. 3. Adhering strictly to the Golden Rule ('AUDIO DICTATES WHEN' and 'NEVER output text if there is no vocal audio driving it'), no subtitle entries are generated in the 'subs' field because there is no vocal audio to provide a ground truth for timing. 4. For contextual completeness, the prominent on-screen text is a message from Todoroki Hajime thanking her fans ('Minatan') for her first birthday live (og: 'みなたん！！ いつも応援ありがとう！！ ずっと夢だった生誕LIVEができて本当に幸せです！！ このステージで、これからもパワーアップして、毎回最高を更新し続けます！！ 重大告知アリ', en: 'Everyone!! Thank you for always supporting me!! I'm really happy to be able to do the birthday LIVE I've always dreamed of!! On this stage, I'll keep powering up and continuing to reach new heights every time!! Major announcement included').
